title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.30 — LIMITER IN/OUT (new LIM_ON param). Needed because v0.4.25 made CLEAN limit at the knob, which removed the only way to NOT limit (CLEAN used to double as limiter-off). IMPORTANT SCOPE FINDING: the LIMITER panel is misleadingly named — LIM_INPUT is applied at PluginProcessor.cpp:927, the VERY START of the chain (it is the plugin input drive feeding GRIT/AMBER/COMPRESS), and LEVEL/TONE are the output stage. Only LIMIT + AUTO LEVEL are actually the limiter. So the power button gates ONLY the limiting, NOT the panel: INPUT/LEVEL/TONE keep working and stay lit; only the LIMIT tile goes dead-lens and AUTO LEVEL disables. LATENCY IS CONSTANT: when out, the lookahead delay line still runs (processStereoDelayOnly), so toggling never forces a PDC change. OUT CLIP is a separate stage with its own TWEAK control and still applies in DIRTY (a pure delay and a memoryless clip commute, so order is equivalent). GR reports 0 when out, so the GR meter empties and the LIMIT red glow goes cold. Defaults ON => existing sessions/presets recall unchanged; no DSPVersion bump needed. VERIFY IN ABLETON: toggle the LIMITER power and confirm limiting stops but INPUT still drives the plugin and LEVEL/TONE still work; confirm the host reports the same latency both ways. OPEN: the panel arguably wants renaming (it is an output stage with a limiter in it); painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces.
